attacking_style: Not a traditional attacker. Thrives in technical, short time trials with mixed terrain (climbs + descents), where power-to-weight and handling offset pure climbing limitations.
team_tactics: Team (Astana) attempts jersey defense through intermediate sprint control, though execution has proven tactically wasteful and energy-inefficient.
terrain_preference: Technical hilly courses with 5-10km distances featuring descent/flat finishes. Exposed on pure climbing stages and in lengthy uphill finishes where specialists prevail.
vulnerability: Sprint timing errors (goes too early), particularly from disadvantageous positions. Energy management for jersey defense compromises race performance. Misjudges finish distances.
key_patterns: Underestimated all-rounder: labeled sprinter but defeats pure climbers on technical hilly terrain (2 instances)
Premature sprint launches: initiates efforts too early, caught before line despite opening gaps (2 instances)
Inefficient jersey defense: team efforts for points classification waste energy without tactical payoff (2 instances)
form_trajectory: negative: Multiple tactical errors in 2021 including mistimed sprints and energy-wasting jersey defense attempts suggest declining tactical sharpness
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 2
